response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video duration (00:00-04:59). 2. Identified the content as a cooking stream featuring a VTuber. 3. Listened carefully for vocal music throughout the clip and confirmed there is none, only conversational audio and kitchen sounds. 4. Verified on-screen text for any music credit and found none.
response.global_summary: The video shows a VTuber in an Aogiri High School uniform cooking a no-water spice curry dish. The segment focuses entirely on the cooking process and the VTuber's commentary. There is no vocal music present in this video.

scenes.description: The VTuber is cooking vegetables and chicken in a pan, discussing the ingredients and process with the viewers. There is no vocal music present.
